domain: camera, audio, and creator-equipment rigging hardware

ideas.idea_title: Cage-Mounted HDMI Cable Clamp With Captive Wedge
ideas.product_context: A compact clamp for mirrorless camera cages that secures a full-size or micro-HDMI cable near the camera body during handheld video work.
ideas.core_function: Prevent cable strain and accidental unplugging while allowing quick cable removal without detaching the camera cage.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined aluminum clamp body with stepped cable channel, cage mounting slot, captive wedge pocket, and thumbscrew bore.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines small asymmetric features, stepped channels, counterbores, sliding wedge geometry, rounded cable reliefs, and tight clearances around threaded hardware.

ideas.product_context: A camera-top accessory bridge for mounting two compact wireless microphone receivers above a cinema or mirrorless camera cage.
ideas.core_function: Hold two receivers side by side while leaving clearance for screen tilt, cables, and top-handle operation.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined bridge bar with two cold-shoe rails, center cage-mount slot, cable clearance scallops, and end-stop lips.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires accurate rail profiles, repeated but mirrored mounting features, undercut-like lips, slot placement, and clearance cutouts tied to real accessory envelopes.

ideas.idea_title: Low-Profile NATO Rail Microphone Shock Mount Base
ideas.product_context: A base adapter that lets a small shotgun microphone shock mount slide onto a camera cage NATO rail.
ideas.core_function: Provide fast repositioning of a microphone while locking securely to a standard camera rig rail.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined NATO clamp block with dovetail jaw profile, locking screw boss, microphone mount boss, and relief pockets.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests standardized rail geometry, angled clamping faces, screw-axis alignment, raised bosses, weight-reducing pockets, and functional interference constraints.

ideas.product_context: A machined center joint for a field monitor arm used on camera rigs, positioned between two short adjustable arms.
ideas.core_function: Allow a monitor to rotate and lock at repeatable angles without slipping during movement.
ideas.likely_main_part: Circular rosette knuckle with radial teeth, central through-bore, side arm clevis ears, and recessed washer seat.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges CAD representation with radial tooth arrays, circular symmetry, clevis geometry, coaxial bores, recesses, and load-bearing mating surfaces.

ideas.product_context: A clamp-on holder for attaching a small field audio recorder to a boom pole during documentary sound recording.
ideas.core_function: Secure the recorder at a readable angle while isolating it from rotation around the pole.
ideas.likely_main_part: Curved machined cradle with cylindrical pole clamp saddle, recorder backplate, strap slots, and angled viewing offset.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Mixes cylindrical grip surfaces, angled planar mounting, strap pass-through slots, filleted transitions, and ergonomic offsets in one compact part.

ideas.idea_title: Camera Cage Side Handle ARRI-Locating Mount Block
ideas.product_context: A side-handle interface block for attaching a wooden or aluminum grip to a cinema camera cage using ARRI-style locating pins.
ideas.core_function: Prevent handle twist while transferring hand loads into the camera cage.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined mount block with central threaded bore, two locating pin holes, handle tenon pocket, and contoured finger-side chamfers.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests precise hole patterns, anti-rotation features, pocketed mating geometry, chamfer orientation, and structural massing around high-load fasteners.

ideas.idea_title: V-Mount Battery Plate Offset Spacer With Cable Tunnel
ideas.product_context: An offset spacer used between a V-mount battery plate and a compact cinema camera rig to improve clearance for rear ports.
ideas.core_function: Move the battery plate backward and upward while routing power cables through a protected internal path.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined spacer block with staggered mounting holes, internal cable tunnel, rear plate bosses, and side-access cutout.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Includes non-coplanar mounting interfaces, hidden passage geometry, offset hole patterns, weight relief, and cable bend-radius constraints.

ideas.idea_title: Overhead Desk Camera Arm Clamp Head
ideas.product_context: A clamp head for a creator desk rig that holds a vertical camera arm above a work surface for top-down filming.
ideas.core_function: Lock a round or square vertical post to the desk-edge clamp while resisting rotation and sag.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined clamp head with desk-clamp interface flange, vertical post bore, split-clamp slot, pinch screw bosses, and anti-rotation keyway.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests split clamp mechanics, large bores through compact geometry, keyways, flange transitions, screw bosses, and perpendicular load paths.

ideas.idea_title: Lens Support Yoke for 15mm Rod Rig
ideas.product_context: A support yoke that mounts to standard 15mm rods and cradles a heavy cinema lens beneath the barrel.
ideas.core_function: Transfer lens weight into the rod system while allowing height adjustment for different lens diameters.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined yoke body with twin rod bores, vertical adjustment slot, curved lens saddle, and locking screw lands.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines parallel precision bores, curved support surfaces, slotted vertical adjustment, symmetric structure, and contact geometry for cylindrical lenses.

ideas.idea_title: Creator Light Stand Cable-Managed Ball Head Adapter
ideas.product_context: A compact adapter between a small LED panel ball head and a light stand, designed for studio creators who need tidy power routing.
ideas.core_function: Adapt stand threads to a ball head while guiding the light power cable through a protected side channel.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined adapter puck with threaded stand socket, raised ball-head boss, radial cable groove, clamp screw hole, and knurled grip perimeter.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires concentric threaded features, radial cable routing, perimeter grip texture, raised bosses, and small-scale clearances around fastening hardware.
